task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Internal Request Queue** (Level 8)

Build an internal request queue for IT/HR/Facilities/Finance tickets. Employees submit a request (title, description, category, priority, submitter). Ops staff can update requests (requires login) — change status, assign to a team, add resolution notes. Need: POST /api/requests (public), GET /api/requests (list), GET /api/requests/new (filter by status='new'), PUT /api/requests/:id (auth required).

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  category, default 'IT'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  submitter, required
  status, default 'new'
  assigned_to
  resolution_notes

allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@company.com'

# POST endpoint - create a new request
when user sends data to /api/requests:
  validate data:
    title is text, required
    submitter is text, required
  saved = save data to Requests
  send back saved with status 201

# GET all requests
when user calls GET /api/requests:
  all_requests = get all Requests
  send back all_requests

# GET requests filtered by status='new'
when user calls GET /api/requests/new:
  new_requests = get all Requests where status is 'new'
  send back new_requests

# PUT endpoint - update a request (requires login)
when user calls PUT /api/requests/:id sending update_data:
  requires login
  save update_data to Requests
  send back 'updated' with success message

# Frontend - Employee submission page
page 'Submit Request' at '/':
  section 'Employee Request Submission':
    title_input = ''
    description_input = ''
    category_select = 'IT'
    priority_select = 'Normal'
    submitter_input = ''

    'Title' is a text input saved as title_input
    'Description' is a text area saved as description_input
    'Category' is a dropdown with ['IT', 'HR', 'Facilities', 'Finance'] saved as category_select
    'Priority' is a dropdown with ['Low', 'Normal', 'High', 'Urgent'] saved as priority_select
    'Your Name/Email' is a text input saved as submitter_input

    button 'Submit Request':
      send { title: title_input, description: description_input, category: category_select, priority: priority_select, submitter: submitter_input } as a new record to '/api/requests'
      set title_input to ''
      set description_input to ''
      set submitter_input to ''

# Frontend - Ops triage dashboard
page 'Triage Dashboard' at '/triage':
  requires login
  new_requests = []
  all_requests = []

  on page load:
    get new_requests from '/api/requests/new'
    get all_requests from '/api/requests'

  section 'All Requests':
    display all_requests as table

  section 'New Requests':
    display new_requests as table
